name: Prism Cup Karting
summary: A fan-made, fully simulated kart-racing league with items, chaos and live browser races.
description: A just-for-fun homage to the kart-racing game genre: original mascot racers across light, medium and heavy classes, original items (Seeker Orbs that hunt the leader, Slick Patches, Comet Boosts, Static Shields) with genre-faithful rubber-banding, and eight original fantasy circuits from a glass parkway in the sky to a molten keep. Cups are simulated from a fixed seed, and the website runs live in-browser races — pick a track and a favorite, drop the flag, watch the item chaos play out lap by lap. Every character, item, track and result is original and simulated; not affiliated with any video game company. No real-world data, no predictions, no betting relevance — entertainment only.
datasets: Fully simulated — seeded synthetic cups, no real-world data
